name: Example Academic University
programSummary: This is a demo program record. Replace it with real school notes from the athletics site before sending emails.

name: Princeton University
programSummary: Princeton is a Division I FCS football program in the Ivy League, located in Princeton, New Jersey. Princeton Athletics directs prospective student-athletes to contact the appropriate head coach or use its online recruiting forms, and the football form is listed on the official athletics recruiting forms page. The official football staff page lists current coaching and player personnel contacts for outreach.

name: Rice University
programSummary: Rice is a Division I FBS football program in the American Athletic Conference, located in Houston, Texas. The official 2026 roster page lists the current football coaching staff and support staff, including recruiting and player personnel roles. No official Rice football recruiting questionnaire URL was verified, so recruits should use the official staff contacts and football recruiting staff pages.

name: Harvard University
programSummary: Harvard is a Division I FCS football program in the Ivy League, located in Cambridge, Massachusetts. Harvard's football recruit information page points prospects to Harvard Athletics Recruiting Central, admissions, the NCAA guide, and other helpful information. The official 2026 roster and coach bio pages list current staff roles, emails, and recruiting areas for several coaches.

name: University of Pennsylvania
programSummary: Penn is a Division I FCS football program in the Ivy League, located in Philadelphia, Pennsylvania. The official Penn football coaches page links a recruits page and lists the 2026 staff, including position coaches, co-coordinators, a recruiting coordinator, football operations, and player personnel contacts. Penn plays at historic Franklin Field and is an academic fit for recruits targeting an Ivy League environment.

name: Yale University
programSummary: Yale is a Division I FCS football program in the Ivy League, located in New Haven, Connecticut. Yale announced Kevin Cahill as the Joel E. Smilow '54 Head Coach of Football on February 23, 2026. The official football coaches page still displays a 2025 staff table, so assistant-coach records from that page are useful but should be treated as medium confidence until Yale publishes a 2026 staff table.

name: Columbia University
programSummary: Columbia is a Division I FCS football program in the Ivy League, located in New York City. The official 2026 Columbia football staff page lists the Patricia & Shepard Alexander Head Coach of Football, offensive and defensive coordinators, position coaches, quality-control assistants, and football support staff. The New York location and Ivy League academic profile are useful personalization points for outreach.

name: Dartmouth College
programSummary: Dartmouth is a Division I FCS football program in the Ivy League, located in Hanover, New Hampshire. The official football staff page lists the 2025 staff with several 2026 staff additions reflected on the page, including coaching, operations, and recruiting roles. Dartmouth's recruiting information page directs prospects to a football questionnaire and provides academic, admissions, and NCAA eligibility resources.

name: Cornell University
programSummary: Cornell is a Division I FCS football program in the Ivy League, located in Ithaca, New York. The official 2026-27 football coaching staff page lists position coaches, coordinators, a recruiting coordinator, player personnel, recruiting operations, and football operations contacts. Cornell is a strong academic fit for recruits seeking an Ivy League program with a full position-coach staff directory available online.

name: Brown University
programSummary: Brown is a Division I FCS football program in the Ivy League, located in Providence, Rhode Island. The official 2026 football staff page lists the head coach, coordinators, position coaches, quality-control assistants, and football operations/player personnel support staff. Brown's recruiting questionnaires page encourages prospective student-athletes to complete the questionnaire for their sport of interest.

name: University of Chicago
programSummary: UChicago is an NCAA Division III football program in Chicago, Illinois, and football is an associate member of the Midwest Conference. The official 2026 staff page lists the head coach, coordinators, position coaches, recruiting states for primary recruiters, emails, phones, and X handles where published. UChicago's football prospective-student page links a recruit questionnaire, head-coach contact, and application information.

name: Massachusetts Institute of Technology
programSummary: MIT is an NCAA Division III football program in Cambridge, Massachusetts, competing in the NEWMAC. The official football coaches page lists the head coach and assistant coaches by role, with emails and phones where published. MIT's team recruitment forms page asks prospective student-athletes to select their sport and submit a questionnaire that is sent directly to the head coach.

name: Stanford University
programSummary: Stanford is a Division I FBS football program in the ACC, located in Stanford, California. The official 2026 spring roster lists the football coaching staff and support staff, including Tavita Pritchard, Andrew Luck, position coaches, recruiting strategy, college personnel, and on-campus recruiting roles. Stanford's prospective student-athlete questionnaire page includes football among the available sport questionnaires.

name: Northwestern University
programSummary: Northwestern is a Division I FBS football program in the Big Ten, located in Evanston, Illinois. The official 2026 football staff page lists the coaching staff, football support staff, recruiting, scouting, operations, player engagement, and performance roles. The page verifies several X handles and football recruiting contact emails for staff members tied to recruiting and scouting.

name: University of Houston
programSummary: Houston is a D1 FBS football program in the Big 12, located in Houston, TX. The official football staff page lists current coaching and football support contacts useful for recruiting outreach. No official football recruiting questionnaire URL was verified in this pass, so use the staff page and published staff contacts as the primary outreach fallback.
